zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbot於1306年出生時，他的父親Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot30歲，母親Anne Boteler34歲。他於1326年7月10日與Elizabeth de Comyn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1356年10月23日在英國英格蘭賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素享年50歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbot was born in 1306, his father, Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot, was 30 and his mother, Anne Boteler, was 34. He married Elizabeth de Comyn on 10 July 1326. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 October 1356, in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Herefordshire, England.

Il a épousé Elizabeth de Comyn le 10 juillet 1326. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbotが1306年に生まれた時，父Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbotは30歳，母Anne Botelerは34歳であった。1326年7月10日にElizabeth de Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1356年10月23日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアグドリチグドリチ カストルで50歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbot(이)가 1306년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Boteler(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1326년 7월 10일 Elizabeth de Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년 10월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 구드리치 구드리치 카스틀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbot nasceu em 1306, seu pai, Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Boteler, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Comyn em 10 de julho de 1326. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1356, em Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbot родился в 1306 г., его отцу по имени Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Boteler, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Comyn 10 июля 1326 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 октября 1356 г. в местности гудрич кастл, гудрич, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Talbot 2nd Baron Talbot nació en 1306, su papá, Gilbert Talbot 1st Lord Talbot, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Boteler, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Comyn el 10 de julio de 1326. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1356, en Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
